title: What is the latest research on AI detection?
abstract: Are there any new technologies or contracts that underpin how images, videos or text created with AI can be verified? It seems nobody is really sure whether anything they see online is genuine or not any more; I think most people want protocols to ascertain this, but the technology (or agreement) do
abstract_zh: 目前是否有新的技术和合同支撑AI生成的图像、视频或文本的验证？似乎没有人能确定网上看到的内容是否真实；我认为大多数人希望有协议来确认这一点，但相关技术（或协议）尚未明确。
